{{Quote|Space guys, huh? Just what I need. Huh? Oh, right. As lord high Godking of the most holy Anointed People, I most graciously welcome you travelers from a most distant land to the blessed shores of Masterhome, etc., etc. So, what's on your mind?|Godking Trisstan of Masterhome|<ref name="Godking" />}}
The '''Godking''' was the title held by the supreme monarch of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abonshee]] and its native [[Species/Legends|species]], the [[Anointed People]].<ref name="Godking" /> The Godking dynasties were chosen from among the noble class of the [[Godling]]s. The Godkings had absolute power, but they could only rule as long as others obeyed. Ambitious Godlings attempted to take over the throne. Thus, Godkings were forced to manipulate their enemies so that they would fight each other.<ref name="AE">''[[Alien Encounters]]''</ref>

The Godking ruled from a [[Godking's castle|palace]] thrice as big as the castle of a Godling, in the biggest available [[City/Legends|city]], with a personal guard thrice as big and many soldiers. The Godking was to have many reverence and was introduced with bugles. Before [[74 BBY]], Godkings spent most of their time placating revolts. From that point on, wars were replaced with non-bloody events and Godkings could relax.<ref name="Godking" />

In the times of the Rebellion, the Godking was [[Trisstan]], who led his people to a golden age.<ref name="Godking" /> After joining the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], the Anointed People fought [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] for the greater glory of the Godking.<ref name="MB">[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|''Star Wars Miniatures Battles'', First Edition]]</ref>
